title: Cobblemon Adventures
description: A Cobblemon 1.7.3 modpack that includes a bunch of side mods for Cobblemon. The pack also includes Resource Packs, Shaders, Data Packs, QoL mods, and optimization mods.
body:
# About Cobblemon Adventures: This modpack is meant to expand on the Cobblemon experinece while improving visuals and performance with the inclusion of several optimization mods. There are many Cobblemon addons that add features not yet in the base mod as well as resource packs and a shader pack. ### Technical Details: - Its recommended to run this pack with at least 4 GB of RAM for best performance. - Distant Horizons settings may need to be adjusted for older computers. ### Mods:
Click to open
  • [Cobblemon] BadgeBox - Adds box for storing badges
  • Accessories - Adds slots for accessories
  • AppleSkin - Improved food HUD
  • Bad Wither No Cookie - Reloaded - Localizes Wither and End Dragon sounds
  • Better Ping Display - Fabric Edition - Displays player's ping in player list
  • Carry On - Allows player to pick up tile entities and mobs
  • Client Sort - Adds inventory sorting
  • Clumps - Groups XP orbs together to reduce lag
  • CobbledGacha - Adds Cobblemon themed Gacha machines
  • CobbleFurnies - Adds Cobblemon inspired furniture
  • Cobblemon - Adds Pokemon
  • Cobblemon Alpha Project - Adds alpha cobblemon
  • Cobblemon Box Link - Adds Box link from modern Pokemon games
  • Cobblemon Capture XP - Grants EXP when capturing wild Pokemon
  • Cobblemon Counter - Addon that keeps track of wild KO/capture count/streaks
  • Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn - Addon that makes cobblemon run away or fight back when attacked
  • Cobblemon Integrations - Adds various mod integrations
  • Cobblemon Move Dex - Adds move list to Pokedex
  • Cobblemon Move Inspector - Addon that adds tooltip discription to moves in battle
  • Cobblemon Pokemon Badges - Adds Pokemon badges
  • Cobblemon Pokenav - Adds Pokenav
  • Cobblemon Repel - Adds repel block
  • Cobblemon Unchained - KOs and/or capture streak bonuses
  • Cobblemon: CobbleStats - Adds stat change and terrain info
  • Cobblemon: Mega Showdown - Adds every generational gimmick
  • Cobbreeding - Adds breeding to Cobblemon
  • Comforts - Adds sleeping bags and hammocks
  • Continuity - Allows for connected textures
  • Controlling - Adds a search bar to Key-Bindings menu
  • Cooking for Blockheads - Adds multiblock kitchens
  • Cut Through - Allows for attacking through grass
  • Distant Horizons - Allows for increased render distance
  • Double Doors - Allows for double doors to be opened simultaneously
  • Enhanced Block Entities - Reduce block entity lag
  • Entity Culling - Increases performance
  • Explorer's Compass - Adds Compass for locating structures
  • FerriteCore - Adds memory usage optimizations
  • Gravestones - Adds Gravestones
  • ImmediatelyFast - Increases rendering speeds
  • Item Highlighter - Highlights newly picked-up items
  • Jade - Adds information HUD
  • Just Enough Items - Adds an item and recipe viewer
  • Just Enough Resources (JER) - Adds info on mobs, world gen, villagers, and more
  • LambDynamicLights - Adds dynamic lights
  • Leaves Be Gone - Adds quick leaf decay
  • Lithium - Adds game optimizations
  • Mod Menu - Adds a mod menu to settings
  • ModernFix - Adds several performance improvements
  • MoreCobblemonTweaks - QOL addon for PC box and eggs
  • Myths and Legends [Cobblemon Sidemod] - Adds Key Items for spawning legendary Pokemon
  • Nature's Compass - Adds compass for locating biomes
  • Particle Rain - Replaces weather with particles and increases performance
  • Pokeblocks - Adds Cobblemon themed dolls
  • Polymorph - Adds option for switching between recipes
  • Radical Cobblemon Trainers - Adds Trainers
  • Respackopts - Adds menu to change options in resource packs
  • Satin Free Wakes - Adds wakes and splashing animation to water
  • SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon - Adds TMs and TRs
  • Sodium - Rendering optimization mod
  • Sophisticated Backpacks - Adds backpacks
  • Sophisticated Storage (Unofficial Fabric port) - Adds upgradable storage containers
  • Status Effect Bars - Adds status effect bars showing duration of effect
  • Supplementaries - Adds vanilla like decorations and utility items
  • Terralith - Adds lots of biomes
  • Tom's Simple Storage Mod - Adds a storage control system
  • Tom's Trading Network - Adds a vending machine
  • Trash Cans - Adds trash cans
  • Trinkets - Adds trinket slots
  • Veinminer - Adds vein mining
  • Veinminer Enchantment - Makes veinmine an enchantment
  • Wraith Waystones - Adds Waystones
  • Xaero's Minimap - Adds a minimap
  • Xaero's World Map - Adds a world map
  • Yeetus Experimentus - Disables the "Experimental Settings" popup
### Datapacks:
Click to open
  • Cobblemon additions - Adds Pokemon themed Villages/Cities
### Resource Packs:
Click to open
  • Cobblemon Interface - Makes interfaces cobblemon themed
  • Cobblemon Interface: Modded - Makes modded interfaces cobblemon themed
  • E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons - Adds pokemon icons to minimap
  • Radical Cobblemon Trainer Textures Plus - Skins for trainers
  • Sparkles: Stardust Labs Resourcepack - Fixes minimap biome names
### Shaders: - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - (Enabled by default) Recommended shader pack
